steps.description: Type #text:${{env:RESOURCE_GROUP_REGION}} into the "Location for the new resource group" input field within the Visual Studio Code extension interface for Microsoft 365 Agents, triggering a dropdown list of region options.
Press the Enter key to select ${{env:RESOURCE_GROUP_REGION}} from the region dropdown in the "Location for the new resource group" input field within the Visual Studio Code interface.
